title: SpecKiwi functional integrity remediation plan

pre_commit_gate.cmd: npm test -- test/hardening/security.test.ts test/cache/cache.test.ts test/search/search.test.ts test/cli/read-commands.test.ts test/mcp/tools.test.ts test/graph/graph.test.ts
npm test -- test/hardening/security.test.ts test/cache/cache.test.ts test/search/search.test.ts test/cli/read-commands.test.ts test/mcp/tools.test.ts test/graph/graph.test.ts

out_of_scope: Pure performance optimization and indexing redesign

phases.title: Secure cache artifact cleanup
phases.goal: Prevent cache shard cleanup from deleting files outside the workspace.

tasks.title: Add guarded cache artifact deletion
method_signatures: async function deleteCacheArtifactIfInside(root: WorkspaceRoot, storePath: string, guard: RealPathGuard): Promise<boolean>
implementation_guide: Create createRealPathGuard(root) before stale shard cleanup.
Resolve each cache/requirements/<64hex>.json path with resolveRealStorePathWithGuard.
Delete only the guarded absolutePath.
Do not swallow workspace escape errors.
Guard generated cache output cleanup in rebuild failure handling.
tasks.rationale: A symlinked cache shard directory must not allow external file deletion.
pitfalls: Do not leave resolve(root.speckiwiPath, storePath) deletion paths for cache artifacts.
Regex path checks do not prove realpath containment.
tasks.test_guidance: Add symlink cleanup tests in TASK-P0-002.
dod: Shard cleanup and generated artifact cleanup both use guarded resolution.

rollback.command: Restore src/cache/rebuild.ts and src/cache/clean.ts from git, then run npm test -- test/cache/cache.test.ts.

tasks.title: Add symlink cleanup security tests
method_signatures: async function createSymlinkedRequirementCacheFixture(): Promise<{ root: string; externalFile: string }>
implementation_guide: Create an external 64-hex shard JSON file.
Symlink .speckiwi/cache/requirements to the external directory.
Run rebuildCache and cleanCache.
Assert the external shard file still exists.
tasks.rationale: The fix must be proven against the actual symlink escape shape.
pitfalls: Handle Windows symlink permissions explicitly in the test helper.
tasks.test_guidance: POSIX must execute the symlink scenario.
dod: External file deletion fails the test suite.

rollback.command: Remove the new symlink cleanup tests, then run npm test -- test/hardening/security.test.ts.

phases.title: Cache output hash freshness
phases.goal: Reject tampered or stale cache outputs by comparing manifest hashes to artifact bytes.

tasks.title: Verify manifest output hashes in section freshness
method_signatures: export async function outputsMatchManifest(root: WorkspaceRoot, outputs: CacheFileHash[]): Promise<boolean>
async function hashCacheOutput(root: WorkspaceRoot, storePath: string): Promise<string | undefined>
implementation_guide: Replace outputsExist with hash verification.
Hash actual output file bytes and compare against CacheFileHash.sha256.
Return false from isIndexSectionFresh on any output mismatch.
Keep freshness section-scoped.
tasks.rationale: Recorded output hashes must participate in read-path freshness.
pitfalls: Do not warn and continue using the cache on mismatch.
Do not bind search freshness to graph output hashes.
tasks.test_guidance: Modify cache/search-index.json to valid JSON with different bytes and assert stale handling.
dod: Output hash mismatch makes section freshness false.

rollback.command: Restore src/cache/manifest.ts and tests from git, then run npm test -- test/cache/cache.test.ts test/search/search.test.ts.

tasks.title: Apply output hash checks to exact requirement cache
method_signatures: async function cacheOutputMatchesManifest(root: WorkspaceRoot, manifest: IndexManifestV2, storePath: string): Promise<boolean>
implementation_guide: Check cache/entities.json and the target requirement shard against manifest output hashes.
Check cache/relations.json when includeRelations is true.
Treat output mismatch as cache miss and fall back to YAML source.
Avoid returning stale statement, entity, or relation data.
tasks.rationale: Exact lookup must not return valid JSON cache data whose hash no longer matches the manifest.
pitfalls: Unchanged source stat does not override output mismatch.
Entity cache memo must not reuse stale artifact after mismatch.
tasks.test_guidance: Mutate requirement shard and relations JSON to valid mismatched artifacts and assert source results.
dod: Exact requirement cache freshness verifies entities, shard, and relation outputs.

rollback.command: Restore src/core/requirements.ts and cache tests from git, then run npm test -- test/cache/cache.test.ts.

phases.title: Read model memo integrity
phases.goal: Prevent process-local memo reuse when artifact bytes no longer match the verified cache state.

tasks.title: Include verified artifact hash signal in memo key
method_signatures: async function hashArtifactIntegrityInputs(root: WorkspaceRoot, sections: readonly IndexSectionName[]): Promise<string>
implementation_guide: Include manifest output hash or verified artifact hash token in the memo key.
Do not rely on artifact size and mtime alone.
Allow artifact-based memo hit only after section hash verification.
Keep memo stats and clear API stable.
tasks.rationale: A stat-preserving artifact mutation must not reuse a stale read model.
pitfalls: Do not expand this task into latency optimization.
tasks.test_guidance: Fill memo, mutate artifact with same size or preserved mtime, then assert stale model is not reused.
dod: Stat-preserving artifact mismatch does not produce a memo hit.

rollback.command: Restore src/core/read-model.ts and memo tests from git, then run npm test -- test/search/search.test.ts test/mcp/tools.test.ts.

phases.title: Functional verification hardening
phases.goal: Add direct tests for filters, MCP contracts, and graph no-cache semantics.

tasks.title: Strengthen CLI and Core requirement filter tests
implementation_guide: Create a temp fixture with 2-3 requirements.
Test project, scope, type, status, and tag positive combinations.
Test unknown scope, wrong status, wrong tag, wrong type, and mixed comma values.
Test Core direct string and string array inputs.
Assert pagination metadata after filtering.
tasks.rationale: Status and scope filters need direct evidence beyond single-item fixtures.
pitfalls: Do not rely only on valid-basic because it has insufficient filter diversity.
tasks.test_guidance: Cover CLI and Core API paths.
dod: Requirement filter tests cover positive, negative, array input, and pagination cases.

rollback.command: Remove the new filter tests, then run npm test -- test/cli/read-commands.test.ts.

tasks.title: Strengthen MCP filter, invalid params, and output schema tests
method_signatures: async function callMcpTool(name: string, args: unknown): Promise<McpToolResult>
implementation_guide: Add speckiwi_list_requirements string and array filter tests.
Add empty page and negative filter tests.
Add InvalidParams tests for list, graph, trace, and search.
Assert missing requirement returns a domain error envelope.
Parse read-only tool output schemas including error result shape.
tasks.rationale: MCP schema and domain error separation is part of the public agent interface.
pitfalls: Do not convert domain errors into protocol InvalidParams errors.
tasks.test_guidance: Keep tests focused on adapter contract, not implementation internals.
dod: MCP filter, InvalidParams, domain error, and outputSchema coverage is explicit.

rollback.command: Remove the new MCP tests, then run npm test -- test/mcp/tools.test.ts.

tasks.title: Add graph no-cache CLI test
implementation_guide: Delete .speckiwi/cache in a temp workspace.
Run node bin/speckiwi graph --root <tmp> --no-cache --json.
Assert exit 0 and ok true graph payload.
Assert .speckiwi/cache was not created.
tasks.rationale: Graph no-cache behavior needs CLI-level evidence.
pitfalls: Graph command is source-based today, so direct regression coverage is the main deliverable.
tasks.test_guidance: Use existing CLI test helpers for stable JSON stdout parsing.
dod: Graph --no-cache does not create cache artifacts in CLI tests.

rollback.command: Remove the graph no-cache CLI test, then run npm test -- test/cli/read-commands.test.ts test/graph/graph.test.ts.
